meaning: n.(交战国间的)停火执行者(或小组)
examples: She's the peacekeeper in that family.
They want the United Nations to play a bigger role as the world's peacekeeper.
That's ridiculous! I'm a soldier, not a peacekeeper.
The United Nations as world peacekeeper has met that fate, even though statesmen will pretend otherwise.
Last month, a Russian peacekeeper was shot and killed in a similar attack nearby.
